entries.title: Former Indiana governor explains how his nonprofit will help workers impacted by AI boom
entries.description: RAISE US, a nonprofit group, launched a new fund to help ease the transition for workers impacted by AI. Former Indiana Gov. Eric Holcomb, a co-chair of RAISE US, joins to discuss.

entries.title: Fear grips Haitian communities after Supreme Court ruling unwinds protection from deportation
entries.description: Fear is ricocheting through Haitian communities across the United States after the Supreme Court decided to allow the Trump administration to end legal protections for migrants fleeing violence and natural disasters

entries.title: Convicted rapist who faked death and fled U.S. has died
entries.description: Nicholas Rossi​, 38, was serving at least 10 years in prison in Utah following his convictions in 2025 in two sexual assault cases.

entries.title: Judge holds Charlie Kirk murder case prosecutors in contempt for comments about guilt

entries.title: Trump says Iran violated ceasefire with drone strike on cargo ship in Strait of Hormuz
entries.description: President Trump on Friday accused Iran of violating the ceasefire with the U.S. after Iranian drones attacked commercial ships in the Strait of Hormuz. CBS News' Nikole Killion has more.

entries.title: White House mandates move away from overdose prevention in US health programs
entries.description: Experts say move signals greater political interference into public health and will exacerbate opioid overdose crisisHealth programs receiving federal funding must agree within days to new priorities from the Trump administration, including a focus on “parental authority” in education and a move away from proven overdose-prevention methods like harm reduction, suggesting greater political control over public health.The new priorities will likely affect progress against the opioid crisis, and they could signal an attack on vaccination requirements at schools, which are set at the state and local level. The priorities may also weaponize public health to quash “public disorder.” Continue reading...

entries.title: Election worker says federal officers confronted her at polls over social media post criticizing ICE
entries.description: A poll worker says two federal officers visited her at a voting location during New York’s party primaries to confront her about a social media post she’d written criticizing the ICE officer who fatally shot Renee Good in Minneapolis

entries.title: Corgi, the buzzy Y Combinator-backed insurance tech startup, says it didn’t steal an open source product
entries.description: Corgi became embroiled in  controversy when Papermark accused it of stealing its software. Corgi says it did not, raising new questions about vibe coding.

entries.title: 5 million have dropped ACA insurance after Trump and the GOP let prices skyrocket
